use_cases: Landing page hero with animated 3D tunnel/fractal shader effects for product launches
Creative portfolio or demo showcase backgrounds with immersive WebGL visuals
Tech company marketing pages needing eye-catching animated backgrounds
Interactive product reveal sections with continuous shader animations
Modern SaaS landing pages requiring visually striking animated hero sections
ai_summary: A WebGL shader-powered hero component that renders an animated 3D tunnel/fractal effect using GLSL fragment shaders. Features continuous time-based animation with colorful gradient visuals and depth simulation, designed as a visually striking launch/hero background for landing pages and product showcases. Requires WebGL2 support and compiles custom vertex/fragment shaders at runtime.
